scripts.test: env -u FORCE_COLOR NO_COLOR=1 bun test tests/core-boundary.test.ts tests/event-stream.test.ts tests/live-event.test.ts tests/queue-contract.test.ts tests/watch-state.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: env -u FORCE_COLOR NO_COLOR=1 bun test --max-concurrency=1 --timeout=30000 tests/e2e.test.ts tests/supervisor.test.ts tests/transport-contract.test.ts tests/server-lifecycle.test.ts
